DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-29-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT SYNNEX CORPORATION'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained with 10 days leave to amend to plead fraud with greater specificity. Prevailing party to prepare form of order. (301/PJB/JF) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189

MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-11-2006 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Amend Pltf'S Complaint
Off Calendar Oct-18-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Benjamin Riley, Esq. of Chapman, Popik & White, 415-352-3000 for plaintiff and moving party CVPartners in Technology, Inc.
Phillip Kilduff, Esq. , 415-673-0368 specially appearing for defendant and opposing party Synnex Corp.

RULING:
MATTER WAS NOT A R G U E D and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows --
PLAINTIFF CVPARTNERS IN TECHNOLOGY, INC.'S Motion To Amend Plaintiff's Complaint IS GRANTED WITH 10 DAYS TO RESPOND. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 8189. (301/PJB/JF)
